RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS Denied. Plaintiff presented admissible evidence creating a triable issue whether the City had constructive notice of the broken sidewalk curb. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)
